text: 2026-07-09 decisions (Brad): D1 mote authoritative, beads retired (CLAUDE.md updated). D2 amatrix.models dropped from release scope. D3 benchmark epic = minimal enforcing gate for v0.1.0 (ho0 + zxn + fix gate); quc/1x2 post-release. D4 Windows path in scope via amatrix-tw4. Author identity fixed across all packages: Bradley Buchsbaum <brad.buchsbaum@gmail.com>. Master plan: planning_docs/plan-release-readiness-2026-07.md
